posts.title: python的json和time库
posts.text: json库首先引入json库 1import json 这里我们只讲两个函数，json.dumps和json.loads： 函数 描述 json.dumps 将Python对象编码成JSON字符串 json.loads 将JSON字符串解码成Python对象 json.dumps用法1json.dumps(obj, skipkeys=False, ensure_ascii=True, check_circular=True, allow_nan=True, cls=None, indent=None, separators=None, encoding="utf-8", default=None, sort_keys=False, **kw) 例子123456import jsondata = [{ 'a' : 1, 'b' : 2, 'c' : 3, 'd' : 4, 'e' : 5 }]res = json.dumps(data)print(res) 结果： 1[{"a": 1, "c": 3, "b": 2, "e": 5, "d": 4}] 当然可以格式化输出 123456import jsondata = [{ 'a' : 1, 'b' : 2, 'c' : 3, 'd' : 4, 'e' : 5 }]res = json.dumps(data, sort_keys=True, indent=4, separators=(',', ': '))print(res) 结果： 123456789[ { "a": 1, "b": 2, "c": 3, "d": 4, "e": 5 }] json.loads用法1json.loads(s[, encoding[, cls[, object_hook[, parse_float[, parse_int[, parse_constant[, object_pairs_hook[, **kw]]]]]]]]) 例子1234567#!/usr/bin/pythonimport jsondata = '{"a":1,"b":2,"c":3,"d":4,"e":5}';res = json.loads(data)print(res) time库首先引入time库 1import time 获取当前时间戳 1now = time.time() 时间戳转换为当地时间 1print(time.localtime(time)) 将时间戳格式化 12# 转换为类似 2000-01-01 12:00:00的格式time.strftime("%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S", time.localtime())

posts.title: Hello World
posts.text: Welcome to Hexo! This is your very first post. Check documentation for more info. If you get any problems when using Hexo, you can find the answer in troubleshooting or you can ask me on GitHub. Quick StartCreate a new post1$ hexo new "My New Post" More info: Writing Run server1$ hexo server More info: Server Generate static files1$ hexo generate More info: Generating Deploy to remote sites1$ hexo deploy More info: Deployment 12345678#include <iostream>using namespace std;int main() { cout << "Hello, World"; return 0;}
